prompt: Add active ARP resolution for Ethernet forwarding
note: Ethernet FWD output now sends an ARP request when adjacency is missing, waits for the ARP table to learn the reply via input path, then sends the IPv4 frame. Cross-subnet next-hop resolution continues to use FIB next_hop_ip when present.

+

Open DPlane packet port before FWD Ethernet send

+

Runtime now opens the DPlane/Npcap packet port before handing it to FWD Ethernet output, fixing send_frame failures caused by unopened ports.

+

+

Deliver ICMP echo replies from DPlane input to VVRP ping

+

Added ICMP echo reply inbox in VVRP state; DPlane input now records echo replies for local VVRP addresses, and VVRP ping waits for matching replies and prints VRP-style output/statistics.

+

+

Move Ethernet frame handling out of DPlane

+

DPlane packet input now only receives raw frames and delegates to an injected Ethernet input handler. Ethernet owns frame parsing, ARP dispatch, IPv4/ICMP delivery, and frame debug processing.

+
